content.en:
Before you know it, the first year of the tens of millions of realms has passed.

At this time, the Star Sea Great Ancestor, the Blood Great Ancestor, and the Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor were all very close to the five hundredth stone steps, and Ye Tian was also very close to the five hundredth stone steps.

In addition, the major forces have also sent many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in, and there are nearly thirty powerhouses on the immeasurable blood list gathered in the sixth layer, all of whom are standing in the position of more than four hundred stone steps.

For them, once they have reached the 500th stone step, then there is hope to reach the 600th stone step.

Only by walking up to the sixth-hundredth stone steps could they enter the seventh layer.

If you can't even enter the seventh layer, you are naturally not qualified to enter the ninth layer and seize the ruin stone tower.

this day.

Xinghai Great Ancestor suddenly got up and immediately went out from the ruins stone tower.

This scene made many high-level immeasurable lifeforms puzzled, and they didn't understand why the Star Sea Great Ancestor had left the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Soon, other high-level immeasurable lifeforms also left from the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

The Blood Ancestor frowned, but quickly guessed the reason.

However, he didn't care about continuing to refine his immeasurable will here, and he didn't do anything.

......

Genki Pavilion Headquarters.

The Xinghai Great Ancestor returned, and immediately met the Xuanxin Great Ancestor, one of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Xuanqi Pavilion.

The Xuanxin Great Ancestor had already stepped into the fourth stage before the endless years, and now he had walked a distance in the fourth stage, and his strength far surpassed that of the Xinghai Great Ancestor, and his prestige shocked the entire Xuanqi Realm.

At the same time, Xuanxin Great Ancestor is also one of the six deputy pavilion masters of Xuanqi Pavilion, and his status is naturally not comparable to that of Xinghai Great Ancestor.

"I've seen the Xuanxin Pavilion Master!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor hurriedly said.

He received the summons of the Xuanxin Great Ancestor, so he came out of the ruins stone tower as soon as possible.

"Xinghai Great Ancestor, how many stone steps are you on the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower now?" asked Xuanxin Great Ancestor.

"Four hundred and eighty-three stone steps!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said.

"It's still a long way from the six hundred stone steps, and you're not the one who has made the most progress, if you go down at this rate, there may be multiple Great Ancestors who will walk up to the six hundred steps before you, and then enter the seventh layer. We don't know the situation on the seventh, eighth, and ninth layers, and if it's not too difficult, and they reach the ninth layer quickly, then you won't have any hope of competing with them for the Ruined Stone Tower!" Xuanxin Great Ancestor said.

"Xuanxin Pavilion Master, then why did you call me back this time?"

Although the Xinghai Great Ancestor had a guess in his heart, he still asked.

At this time, Xuanxin Great Ancestor took out a purple fruit and handed it to Xinghai Great Ancestor.

"This is the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit!"

The Xinghai Great Ancestor recognized it at a glance, and the ordinary Great Ancestor would not provoke this treasure, because the value of this treasure was comparable to the entire net worth of some third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

The point is that the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit is too difficult to obtain, as far as he knows, there is only a small amount in a certain mysterious place, and even the Xuanqi Pavilion has to pay a certain price to obtain it.

And the function of the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit is to enhance the immeasurable will, which is most suitable for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Under normal circumstances, Xuanqi Pavilion would not have paid a lot of money to obtain the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit, because there was no need, and increasing the immeasurable will would not increase much combat power.

Therefore, it is pure waste to use the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit to enhance the immeasurable will.

Unless it happens to be in a bottleneck state and needs the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit, then it will be obtained at all costs.

And right now, the Xinghai Great Ancestor has not yet reached the point of using the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit.

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, Xuanqi Pavilion is going to let me refine the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit?"

Xinghai Great Ancestor asked.

"Yes!" Xuanxin Great Ancestor said: "Not only the Purple Pole Dao Heart Fruit, but also some other resources, will be allocated to you, but not for free, if you can't capture the Ruins Stone Tower, then you will need to repay these resources to Xuanqi Pavilion in the future." "

"I understand!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said excitedly.

"Then go to retreat and practice, and when the immeasurable will reaches a certain standard, and then go to the sixth layer of the ruin stone tower, then it is possible to break the shackles in one fell swoop and condense the immeasurable will lake!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor commanded.

Lake of Infinite Will!

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea naturally knew that this bottleneck faced by countless high-level immeasurable lifeforms was probably the standard for entering the sixth layer of the Six Hundred Stone Steps of the Will Stone Tower.

Once the immeasurable will reaches a certain limit and breaks it again, the lake of immeasurable will will condense and cause a qualitative change in the immeasurable will.

At that time, the strength will also be improved, but it is extremely difficult to achieve this step.

In addition, after condensing the Infinite Will Lake, it will also increase the chances of winning the fourth stage of impact, but there will be no high-level immeasurable lifeforms to condense the Infinite Will Lake, because without massive resources, it will not be possible to do it in the third stage.

Even if a force like Xuanqi Pavilion wants to cultivate a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that has condensed the Infinite Will Lake, it is currently difficult to do so, and it has to rely on the Ruins Stone Tower.

After that, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea went to retreat.

And the entire Xuanqi Realm, not only the Star Sea Great Ancestor, but also many top third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have all made every effort to enhance their immeasurable will with the help of their respective forces.

It is conceivable that after a short period of time, once these Great Ancestors enter the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, they will definitely approach the six hundred stone steps.

......

"Many Great Ancestors have gone out from the sixth layer, and it seems that they are all working hard to improve their immeasurable will with the help of their forces!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he also knew that even a top force like Xuanqi Pavilion would only do its best to cultivate one Great Ancestor, and would not cultivate a second one.

The same is true for other forces, and they will not cultivate a second Great Ancestor.

Except for the Outside Alliance, those factions are afraid that they will each cultivate one, and will not work together to cultivate one.

As for some slightly weaker forces, they will not be competitive, even if they go all out to cultivate their own Great Ancestor, they will not be able to compare with the top forces such as Xuanqi Pavilion and the Outside Alliance.

"I don't have the power to help, I can only rely on myself, at present, I am not too far away from condensing three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones, if I condense three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones and refine to the limit, I can go to the third stage and condense a drop of immeasurable blood. Once I have condensed the immeasurable blood, the immeasurable will can be improved a little. Moreover, I am cultivating the Taihao Immeasurable Body, and the ascension I have obtained by breaking the realm is incomparable to that of other Great Ancestors, and when the time comes, my Immeasurable Will may be able to help me directly step into the six hundredth stone steps!"

Ye Tian thought so.
